task_completion.description: Navigate to the Organization Structure page in OrangeHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM web interface showing the 'Admin' module, specifically the 'Organization' -> 'Structure' page with the organizational tree visible.
Look for 'Engineering - Backend Systems' displayed as a child node under the 'Engineering' department in the Organization Structure tree, or a success toast notification after adding the unit.
Look for 'Engineering - Applied Research' displayed as a child node under the 'Engineering' department in the Organization Structure tree, or a success toast notification after adding the unit.

task_completion.description: Reassign James Anderson to the Backend Systems sub-unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for James Anderson's profile in the 'PIM' module (Job Details tab) showing 'Sub Unit' set to 'Engineering - Backend Systems', or the Employee List table reflecting this new sub-unit.

task_completion.description: Reassign Christopher Williams to the Backend Systems sub-unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Christopher Williams's profile in the 'PIM' module (Job Details tab) showing 'Sub Unit' set to 'Engineering - Backend Systems', or the Employee List table reflecting this new sub-unit.

task_completion.description: Reassign Daniel Wilson to the Applied Research sub-unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Daniel Wilson's profile in the 'PIM' module (Job Details tab) showing 'Sub Unit' set to 'Engineering - Applied Research', or the Employee List table reflecting this new sub-unit.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active browser interaction with the OrangeHRM GUI (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal commands executing SQL scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application to update records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps like searching for employees, clicking 'Edit' on job details, selecting from dropdowns, and saving, rather than just inspecting or modifying the DOM.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the directive file to get the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, nano, or cat in terminal) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/dept_restructure_directive.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The directive requires creating two specific sub-units with 'Engineering' as their parent: 'Engineering - Backend Systems' and 'Engineering - Applied Research'. Three employees must be reassigned to these new sub-units: James Anderson (EMP001) and Christopher Williams (EMP009) must be assigned to 'Engineering - Backend Systems'. Daniel Wilson (EMP013) must be assigned to 'Engineering - Applied Research'.
